case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. VS. BONNIE LAU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, BONNIE AN INDIVIDUAL
